summary: A brief status update where Patrick apologizes for not posting due to illness. He teases an upcoming post about linkbait strategies he's been developing. The post is essentially a placeholder promising content about SEO link-building tactics. At just 51 words, it's one of his shortest posts and reflects the casual, diary-like nature of his early blogging.
key_points: Patrick was sick with a fever/cold/flu combination, disrupting his posting schedule
He had been working on a linkbait project for a week and planned to write about the strategy
The post signals his commitment to regular blogging even when he had nothing substantial to share
money_quotes: It will be regarding the linkbait I have been working on for a week now, and how you can get linkbait to work for you.
key_insight: Even brief status updates reflect the early blogging ethos of maintaining regular audience engagement, and hint at the SEO-focused marketing strategies Patrick was actively developing.
